programmes.show_description: Martin Geissler and the team bring you thoughtful conversation and expert analysis covering the most interesting news stories in Scotland.
An act of worship with Church of Scotland minister Rev Gillean Maclean in Inverness.
Poet and musician John Hegley shares his Spiritual Life, marking the Dunblane tragedy 30 years on, Louis Theroux's Inside the Manosphere and political posturing at the Oscars.
News, discussion and interviews from politics and beyond.
Richard Gordon presents Sunday's Premiership action, with full commentary of St Mirren v Rangers (12:00 ko) followed by the Dundee derby live from Dens Park (14:00 ko).
Join Gary as he shares your special messages and dedications and plays your favourite Scottish Music requests.
Jamie MacDougall has a concert recording from the BBC Scottish Symphony Orchestra, and we remember composer Sir Peter Maxwell Davies, who passed away ten years ago this month.
Roddy Hart plays handpicked tracks from Scotland and beyond. Featuring Belfast-based alternative-folk singer-songwriter Dani Larkin.
News from across Scotland and the world, plus sport, weather, entertainment and big name interviews.
Connie McLaughlin gets to the heart of the stories making the news.
News updates from Scotland and beyond, plus all your lunchtime sport, travel and weather.
Michelle McManus brings you feel-good music and chat with celebrity guests.
Len Pennie keeps you up to date on what's happening in the arts and culture scene across Scotland.
Breaking down the day's talking points with comment and opinion, plus sport, travel and weather.

programmes.show_name: Get It On with Bryan Burnett
programmes.show_description: It's the bands who could be a businesses - maybe it's a new suit from  Mumford & Sons, some me time at the Oasis or is it an accountant check in with Crosby Stills Nash and Young.
90s rave from Liquid and The Prodigy, classics from The Clash, Supergrass, David Bowie, and Scottish anthems from Biffy Clyro and Young Fathers.
The best company to end the day, with lively chat and some of your favourite tunes.
